35.text: A Psalm of David<S>1732</S>. Plead<S>7378</S> my cause, O LORD<S>3068</S>, with them that strive<S>3401</S> with me: fight<S>3898</S> against them that fight<S>3898</S> against me.

But in mine adversity<S>6761</S> they rejoiced<S>8055</S>, and gathered themselves together<S>622</S>: yea, the abjects<S>5222</S> gathered themselves together<S>622</S> against me, and I knew<S>3045</S> it not; they did tear<S>7167</S> me, and ceased<S>1826</S> not: <sup>adversity: Heb. halting</sup>

Let not them that are mine enemies<S>341</S> wrongfully<S>8267</S> rejoice<S>8055</S> over me: neither let them wink<S>7169</S> with the eye<S>5869</S> that hate<S>8130</S> me without a cause<S>2600</S>. <sup>wrongfully: Heb. falsely</sup>

36.text: To the chief Musician<S>5329</S>, A Psalm of David<S>1732</S> the servant<S>5650</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>. 38.text: A Psalm<S>4210</S> of David<S>1732</S>, to bring to remembrance<S>2142</S>. O LORD<S>3068</S>, rebuke<S>3198</S> me not in thy wrath<S>7110</S>: neither chasten<S>3256</S> me in thy hot displeasure<S>2534</S>.

Hide<S>5641</S> thy face<S>6440</S> from my sins<S>2399</S>, and blot out<S>4229</S> all mine iniquities<S>5771</S>.
Create<S>1254</S> in me a clean<S>2889</S> heart<S>3820</S>, O God<S>430</S>; and renew<S>2318</S> a right<S>3559</S> spirit<S>7307</S> within<S>7130</S> me. <sup>right: or, constant</sup>

Thou hast forgiven<S>5375</S> the iniquity<S>5771</S> of thy people<S>5971</S>, thou hast covered<S>3680</S> all their sin<S>2403</S>. Selah<S>5542</S>.

Thou hast taken away<S>622</S> all thy wrath<S>5678</S>: thou hast turned<S>7725</S> thyself from the fierceness<S>2740</S> of thine anger<S>639</S>. <sup>thyself: or, thine anger from waxing hot</sup>
Turn<S>7725</S> us, O God<S>430</S> of our salvation<S>3468</S>, and cause thine anger<S>3708</S> toward us to cease<S>6565</S>.
Wilt thou be angry<S>599</S> with us for ever<S>5769</S>? wilt thou draw out<S>4900</S> thine anger<S>639</S> to all<S>1755</S> generations<S>1755</S>?
Wilt thou not revive<S>2421</S> us again<S>7725</S>: that thy people<S>5971</S> may rejoice<S>8055</S> in thee?
Shew<S>7200</S> us thy mercy<S>2617</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>, and grant<S>5414</S> us thy salvation<S>3468</S>.

I will hear<S>8085</S> what God<S>410</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> will speak<S>1696</S>: for he will speak<S>1696</S> peace<S>7965</S> unto his people<S>5971</S>, and to his saints<S>2623</S>: but let them not turn again<S>7725</S> to folly<S>3690</S>.
Surely his salvation<S>3468</S> is nigh<S>7138</S> them that fear<S>3373</S> him; that glory<S>3519</S> may dwell<S>7931</S> in our land<S>776</S>.
Mercy<S>2617</S> and truth<S>571</S> are met together<S>6298</S>; righteousness<S>6664</S> and peace<S>7965</S> have kissed<S>5401</S> each other.
Truth<S>571</S> shall spring out<S>6779</S> of the earth<S>776</S>; and righteousness<S>6664</S> shall look down<S>8259</S> from heaven<S>8064</S>.
Yea, the LORD<S>3068</S> shall give<S>5414</S> that which is good<S>2896</S>; and our land<S>776</S> shall yield<S>5414</S> her increase<S>2981</S>.
Righteousness<S>6664</S> shall go<S>1980</S> before<S>6440</S> him; and shall set<S>7760</S> us in the way<S>1870</S> of his steps<S>6471</S>.

86.text: A Prayer<S>8605</S> of David<S>1732</S>. Bow down<S>5186</S> thine ear<S>241</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>, hear<S>6030</S> me: for I am poor<S>6041</S> and needy<S>34</S>. <sup>A Prayer: or, A Prayer, being a Psalm of David</sup>

Preserve<S>8104</S> my soul<S>5315</S>; for I am holy<S>2623</S>: O thou my God<S>430</S>, save<S>3467</S> thy servant<S>5650</S> that trusteth<S>982</S> in thee. <sup>holy: or, one whom thou favourest</sup>
Be merciful<S>2603</S> unto me, O Lord<S>136</S>: for I cry<S>7121</S> unto thee daily<S>3117</S>. <sup>daily: or, all the day</sup>
Rejoice<S>8055</S> the soul<S>5315</S> of thy servant<S>5650</S>: for unto thee, O Lord<S>136</S>, do I lift up<S>5375</S> my soul<S>5315</S>.
For thou, Lord<S>136</S>, art good<S>2896</S>, and ready to forgive<S>5546</S>; and plenteous<S>7227</S> in mercy<S>2617</S> unto all them that call<S>7121</S> upon thee.
Give ear<S>238</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>, unto my prayer<S>8605</S>; and attend<S>7181</S> to the voice<S>6963</S> of my supplications<S>8469</S>.
In the day<S>3117</S> of my trouble<S>6869</S> I will call<S>7121</S> upon thee: for thou wilt answer<S>6030</S> me.
Among the gods<S>430</S> there is none like unto thee, O Lord<S>136</S>; neither are there any works like unto thy works<S>4639</S>.
All nations<S>1471</S> whom thou hast made<S>6213</S> shall come<S>935</S> and worship<S>7812</S> before<S>6440</S> thee, O Lord<S>136</S>; and shall glorify<S>3513</S> thy name<S>8034</S>.
For thou art great<S>1419</S>, and doest<S>6213</S> wondrous things<S>6381</S>: thou art God<S>430</S> alone.
Teach<S>3384</S> me thy way<S>1870</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>; I will walk<S>1980</S> in thy truth<S>571</S>: unite<S>3161</S> my heart<S>3824</S> to fear<S>3372</S> thy name<S>8034</S>.
I will praise<S>3034</S> thee, O Lord<S>136</S> my God<S>430</S>, with all my heart<S>3824</S>: and I will glorify<S>3513</S> thy name<S>8034</S> for evermore<S>5769</S>.
For great<S>1419</S> is thy mercy<S>2617</S> toward me: and thou hast delivered<S>5337</S> my soul<S>5315</S> from the lowest<S>8482</S> hell<S>7585</S>. <sup>hell: or, grave</sup>

O God<S>430</S>, the proud<S>2086</S> are risen<S>6965</S> against me, and the assemblies<S>5712</S> of violent<S>6184</S> men have sought<S>1245</S> after my soul<S>5315</S>; and have not set<S>7760</S> thee before them. <sup>violent: Heb. terrible</sup>

But thou, O Lord<S>136</S>, art a God<S>410</S> full of compassion<S>7349</S>, and gracious<S>2587</S>, longsuffering<S>750</S> <S>639</S>, and plenteous<S>7227</S> in mercy<S>2617</S> and truth<S>571</S>.
O turn<S>6437</S> unto me, and have mercy<S>2603</S> upon me; give<S>5414</S> thy strength<S>5797</S> unto thy servant<S>5650</S>, and save<S>3467</S> the son<S>1121</S> of thine handmaid<S>519</S>.

Shew<S>6213</S> me a token<S>226</S> for good<S>2896</S>; that they which hate<S>8130</S> me may see<S>7200</S> it, and be ashamed<S>954</S>: because thou, LORD<S>3068</S>, hast holpen<S>5826</S> me, and comforted<S>5162</S> me.

87.text: A Psalm<S>4210</S> or Song<S>7892</S> for the sons<S>1121</S> of Korah<S>7141</S>. His foundation<S>3248</S> is in the holy<S>6944</S> mountains<S>2042</S>. <sup>for the sons: or, of the sons</sup>
The LORD<S>3068</S> loveth<S>157</S> the gates<S>8179</S> of Zion<S>6726</S> more than all the dwellings<S>4908</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>.
Glorious things<S>3513</S> are spoken<S>1696</S> of thee, O city<S>5892</S> of God<S>430</S>. Selah<S>5542</S>.

I will make mention<S>2142</S> of Rahab<S>7294</S> and Babylon<S>894</S> to them that know<S>3045</S> me: behold Philistia<S>6429</S>, and Tyre<S>6865</S>, with Ethiopia<S>3568</S>; this man was born<S>3205</S> there.
And of Zion<S>6726</S> it shall be said<S>559</S>, This and that man<S>376</S> was born<S>3205</S> in her: and the highest<S>5945</S> himself shall establish<S>3559</S> her.
The LORD<S>3068</S> shall count<S>5608</S>, when he writeth up<S>3789</S> the people<S>5971</S>, that this man was born<S>3205</S> there. Selah<S>5542</S>.
As well the singers<S>7891</S> as the players<S>2490</S> on instruments shall be there: all my springs<S>4599</S> are in thee.

88.text: A Song<S>7892</S> or Psalm<S>4210</S> for the sons<S>1121</S> of Korah<S>7141</S>, to the chief Musician<S>5329</S> upon Mahalath<S>4257</S> Leannoth<S>6031</S>, Maschil<S>4905</S> of Heman<S>1968</S> the Ezrahite<S>250</S>. O LORD<S>3068</S> God<S>430</S> of my salvation<S>3444</S>, I have cried<S>6817</S> day<S>3117</S> and night<S>3915</S> before thee: <sup>for the sons: or, of the sons</sup> <sup>Maschil: or, A Psalm of Heman the Ezrahite, giving instruction</sup>
Let my prayer<S>8605</S> come<S>935</S> before<S>6440</S> thee: incline<S>5186</S> thine ear<S>241</S> unto my cry<S>7440</S>;
For my soul<S>5315</S> is full<S>7646</S> of troubles<S>7451</S>: and my life<S>2416</S> draweth nigh<S>5060</S> unto the grave<S>7585</S>.
I am counted<S>2803</S> with them that go down<S>3381</S> into the pit<S>953</S>: I am as a man<S>1397</S> that hath no strength<S>353</S>:

Free<S>2670</S> among the dead<S>4191</S>, like the slain<S>2491</S> that lie<S>7901</S> in the grave<S>6913</S>, whom thou rememberest<S>2142</S> no more: and they are cut off<S>1504</S> from thy hand<S>3027</S>. <sup>from: or, by</sup>
Thou hast laid<S>7896</S> me in the lowest<S>8482</S> pit<S>953</S>, in darkness<S>4285</S>, in the deeps<S>4688</S>.
Thy wrath<S>2534</S> lieth hard<S>5564</S> upon me, and thou hast afflicted<S>6031</S> me with all thy waves<S>4867</S>. Selah<S>5542</S>.

Thou hast put away<S>7368</S> mine acquaintance<S>3045</S> far<S>7368</S> from me; thou hast made<S>7896</S> me an abomination<S>8441</S> unto them: I am shut up<S>3607</S>, and I cannot come forth<S>3318</S>.

Mine eye<S>5869</S> mourneth<S>1669</S> by reason of affliction<S>6040</S>: LORD<S>3068</S>, I have called<S>7121</S> daily<S>3117</S> upon thee, I have stretched out<S>7849</S> my hands<S>3709</S> unto thee.
Wilt thou shew<S>6213</S> wonders<S>6382</S> to the dead<S>4191</S>? shall the dead<S>7496</S> arise<S>6965</S> and praise<S>3034</S> thee? Selah<S>5542</S>.
Shall thy lovingkindness<S>2617</S> be declared<S>5608</S> in the grave<S>6913</S>? or thy faithfulness<S>530</S> in destruction<S>11</S>?
Shall thy wonders<S>6382</S> be known<S>3045</S> in the dark<S>2822</S>? and thy righteousness<S>6666</S> in the land<S>776</S> of forgetfulness<S>5388</S>?
But unto thee have I cried<S>7768</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>; and in the morning<S>1242</S> shall my prayer<S>8605</S> prevent<S>6923</S> thee.
LORD<S>3068</S>, why castest thou off<S>2186</S> my soul<S>5315</S>? why hidest<S>5641</S> thou thy face<S>6440</S> from me?
I am afflicted<S>6041</S> and ready to die<S>1478</S> from my youth<S>5290</S> up: while I suffer<S>5375</S> thy terrors<S>367</S> I am distracted<S>6323</S>.
Thy fierce wrath<S>2740</S> goeth over<S>5674</S> me; thy terrors<S>1161</S> have cut me off<S>6789</S>.
They came round about<S>5437</S> me daily<S>3117</S> like water<S>4325</S>; they compassed<S>5362</S> me about together<S>3162</S>. <sup>daily: or, all the day</sup>
Lover<S>157</S> and friend<S>7453</S> hast thou put far<S>7368</S> from me, and mine acquaintance<S>3045</S> into darkness<S>4285</S>.

89.text: Maschil<S>4905</S> of Ethan<S>387</S> the Ezrahite<S>250</S>. I will sing<S>7891</S> of the mercies<S>2617</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> for ever<S>5769</S>: with my mouth<S>6310</S> will I make known<S>3045</S> thy faithfulness<S>530</S> to all<S>1755</S> generations<S>1755</S>. <sup>Maschil: or, A Psalm for Ethan the Ezrahite, to give instruction</sup> <sup>to all: Heb. to generation and generation</sup>
For I have said<S>559</S>, Mercy<S>2617</S> shall be built up<S>1129</S> for ever<S>5769</S>: thy faithfulness<S>530</S> shalt thou establish<S>3559</S> in the very heavens<S>8064</S>.
I have made<S>3772</S> a covenant<S>1285</S> with my chosen<S>972</S>, I have sworn<S>7650</S> unto David<S>1732</S> my servant<S>5650</S>,
Thy seed<S>2233</S> will I establish<S>3559</S> for<S>5704</S> ever<S>5769</S>, and build up<S>1129</S> thy throne<S>3678</S> to all<S>1755</S> generations<S>1755</S>. Selah<S>5542</S>.
And the heavens<S>8064</S> shall praise<S>3034</S> thy wonders<S>6382</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>: thy faithfulness<S>530</S> also in the congregation<S>6951</S> of the saints<S>6918</S>.
For who in the heaven<S>7834</S> can be compared<S>6186</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S>? who among the sons<S>1121</S> of the mighty<S>410</S> can be likened<S>1819</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S>?
God<S>410</S> is greatly<S>7227</S> to be feared<S>6206</S> in the assembly<S>5475</S> of the saints<S>6918</S>, and to be had in reverence<S>3372</S> of all them that are about<S>5439</S> him.
O LORD<S>3068</S> God<S>430</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, who is a strong<S>2626</S> LORD<S>3050</S> like unto thee? or to thy faithfulness<S>530</S> round about<S>5439</S> thee?
Thou rulest<S>4910</S> the raging<S>1348</S> of the sea<S>3220</S>: when the waves<S>1530</S> thereof arise<S>7721</S>, thou stillest<S>7623</S> them.

Thou hast broken<S>1792</S> Rahab<S>7294</S> in pieces<S>1792</S>, as one that is slain<S>2491</S>; thou hast scattered<S>6340</S> thine enemies<S>341</S> with thy strong<S>5797</S> arm<S>2220</S>. <sup>Rahab: or, Egypt</sup> <sup>thy: Heb. the arm of thy strength</sup>

The heavens<S>8064</S> are thine, the earth<S>776</S> also is thine: as for the world<S>8398</S> and the fulness<S>4393</S> thereof, thou hast founded<S>3245</S> them. <sup>the fulness: or, all it containeth</sup>
The north<S>6828</S> and the south<S>3225</S> thou hast created<S>1254</S> them: Tabor<S>8396</S> and Hermon<S>2768</S> shall rejoice<S>7442</S> in thy name<S>8034</S>.
Thou hast a mighty<S>1369</S> arm<S>2220</S>: strong<S>5810</S> is thy hand<S>3027</S>, and high<S>7311</S> is thy right hand<S>3225</S>. <sup>a: Heb. an arm with might</sup>

Justice<S>6664</S> and judgment<S>4941</S> are the habitation<S>4349</S> of thy throne<S>3678</S>: mercy<S>2617</S> and truth<S>571</S> shall go<S>6923</S> before thy face<S>6440</S>. <sup>habitation: or, establishment</sup>
Blessed<S>835</S> is the people<S>5971</S> that know<S>3045</S> the joyful sound<S>8643</S>: they shall walk<S>1980</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>, in the light<S>216</S> of thy countenance<S>6440</S>.
In thy name<S>8034</S> shall they rejoice<S>1523</S> all the day<S>3117</S>: and in thy righteousness<S>6666</S> shall they be exalted<S>7311</S>.
For thou art the glory<S>8597</S> of their strength<S>5797</S>: and in thy favour<S>7522</S> our horn<S>7161</S> shall be exalted<S>7311</S> <S>7311</S>.

For the LORD<S>3068</S> is our defence<S>4043</S>; and the Holy One<S>6918</S> of Israel<S>3478</S> is our king<S>4428</S>. <sup>the LORD: or, our shield is of the LORD, and our king is of the Holy One of Israel</sup>

Then thou spakest<S>1696</S> in vision<S>2377</S> to thy holy one<S>2623</S>, and saidst<S>559</S>, I have laid<S>7737</S> help<S>5828</S> upon one that is mighty<S>1368</S>; I have exalted<S>7311</S> one chosen<S>977</S> out of the people<S>5971</S>.
I have found<S>4672</S> David<S>1732</S> my servant<S>5650</S>; with my holy<S>6944</S> oil<S>8081</S> have I anointed<S>4886</S> him:
With whom my hand<S>3027</S> shall be established<S>3559</S>: mine arm<S>2220</S> also shall strengthen<S>553</S> him.
The enemy<S>341</S> shall not exact<S>5378</S> upon him; nor the son<S>1121</S> of wickedness<S>5766</S> afflict<S>6031</S> him.
And I will beat down<S>3807</S> his foes<S>6862</S> before his face<S>6440</S>, and plague<S>5062</S> them that hate<S>8130</S> him.
But my faithfulness<S>530</S> and my mercy<S>2617</S> shall be with him: and in my name<S>8034</S> shall his horn<S>7161</S> be exalted<S>7311</S>.
I will set<S>7760</S> his hand<S>3027</S> also in the sea<S>3220</S>, and his right hand<S>3225</S> in the rivers<S>5104</S>.
He shall cry<S>7121</S> unto me, Thou art my father<S>1</S>, my God<S>410</S>, and the rock<S>6697</S> of my salvation<S>3444</S>.
Also I will make<S>5414</S> him my firstborn<S>1060</S>, higher<S>5945</S> than the kings<S>4428</S> of the earth<S>776</S>.
My mercy<S>2617</S> will I keep<S>8104</S> for him for evermore<S>5769</S>, and my covenant<S>1285</S> shall stand fast<S>539</S> with him.
His seed<S>2233</S> also will I make<S>7760</S> to endure for ever<S>5703</S>, and his throne<S>3678</S> as the days<S>3117</S> of heaven<S>8064</S>.
If his children<S>1121</S> forsake<S>5800</S> my law<S>8451</S>, and walk<S>3212</S> not in my judgments<S>4941</S>;
If they break<S>2490</S> my statutes<S>2708</S>, and keep<S>8104</S> not my commandments<S>4687</S>; <sup>break: Heb. profane</sup>
Then will I visit<S>6485</S> their transgression<S>6588</S> with the rod<S>7626</S>, and their iniquity<S>5771</S> with stripes<S>5061</S>.

Nevertheless my lovingkindness<S>2617</S> will I not utterly take<S>6331</S> from him, nor suffer my faithfulness<S>530</S> to fail<S>8266</S>. <sup>will: Heb. I will not make void from him</sup> <sup>to fall: Heb. to lie</sup>
My covenant<S>1285</S> will I not break<S>2490</S>, nor alter<S>8138</S> the thing that is gone out<S>4161</S> of my lips<S>8193</S>.
Once<S>259</S> have I sworn<S>7650</S> by my holiness<S>6944</S> that I will not lie<S>3576</S> unto David<S>1732</S>. <sup>that: Heb. if I lie</sup>
His seed<S>2233</S> shall endure for ever<S>5769</S>, and his throne<S>3678</S> as the sun<S>8121</S> before me.
It shall be established<S>3559</S> for ever<S>5769</S> as the moon<S>3394</S>, and as a faithful<S>539</S> witness<S>5707</S> in heaven<S>7834</S>. Selah<S>5542</S>.
But thou hast cast off<S>2186</S> and abhorred<S>3988</S>, thou hast been wroth<S>5674</S> with thine anointed<S>4899</S>.
Thou hast made void<S>5010</S> the covenant<S>1285</S> of thy servant<S>5650</S>: thou hast profaned<S>2490</S> his crown<S>5145</S> by casting it to the ground<S>776</S>.
Thou hast broken down<S>6555</S> all his hedges<S>1448</S>; thou hast brought<S>7760</S> his strong holds<S>4013</S> to ruin<S>4288</S>.
All that pass by<S>5674</S> the way<S>1870</S> spoil<S>8155</S> him: he is a reproach<S>2781</S> to his neighbours<S>7934</S>.
Thou hast set up<S>7311</S> the right hand<S>3225</S> of his adversaries<S>6862</S>; thou hast made all his enemies<S>341</S> to rejoice<S>8055</S>.
Thou hast also turned<S>7725</S> the edge<S>6697</S> of his sword<S>2719</S>, and hast not made him to stand<S>6965</S> in the battle<S>4421</S>.
Thou hast made his glory<S>2892</S> to cease<S>7673</S>, and cast<S>4048</S> his throne<S>3678</S> down<S>4048</S> to the ground<S>776</S>. <sup>glory: Heb. brightness</sup>
The days<S>3117</S> of his youth<S>5934</S> hast thou shortened<S>7114</S>: thou hast covered<S>5844</S> him with shame<S>955</S>. Selah<S>5542</S>.
How long, LORD<S>3068</S>? wilt thou hide<S>5641</S> thyself for ever<S>5331</S>? shall thy wrath<S>2534</S> burn<S>1197</S> like fire<S>784</S>?
Remember<S>2142</S> how short<S>2465</S> my time is: wherefore hast thou made<S>1254</S> all men<S>1121</S> <S>120</S> in vain<S>7723</S>?

What man<S>1397</S> is he that liveth<S>2421</S>, and shall not see<S>7200</S> death<S>4194</S>? shall he deliver<S>4422</S> his soul<S>5315</S> from the hand<S>3027</S> of the grave<S>7585</S>? Selah<S>5542</S>.
Lord<S>136</S>, where are thy former<S>7223</S> lovingkindnesses<S>2617</S>, which thou swarest<S>7650</S> unto David<S>1732</S> in thy truth<S>530</S>?
Remember<S>2142</S>, Lord<S>136</S>, the reproach<S>2781</S> of thy servants<S>5650</S>; how I do bear<S>5375</S> in my bosom<S>2436</S> the reproach of all the mighty<S>7227</S> people<S>5971</S>;
Wherewith thine enemies<S>341</S> have reproached<S>2778</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>; wherewith they have reproached<S>2778</S> the footsteps<S>6119</S> of thine anointed<S>4899</S>.
